success_criteria: AI server revenue, OP/EPS, and rerating moving together can be aligned.
failure_criteria: Revenue growth with margin, inventory, customer, or audit trust breaks becomes 4C.
normalization_point: AI server ODM/EMS is Green-possible, but lower margin and accounting trust risk cap confidence.

success_criteria: Accounting trust recovery can move a case back to watch after evidence is restored.
failure_criteria: Auditor resignation, filing delay, or internal-control trust break is hard 4C until resolved.
normalization_point: This is a RedTeam gate, not a score-weight axis.

success_criteria: Revenue, EBITDA, FCF conversion, and customer diversification moving together can align.
failure_criteria: Price rise with worsening debt, FCF, or concentration is false_positive_score.
normalization_point: Neocloud has visibility through take-or-pay, but debt and GPU depreciation keep it watch-first.

success_criteria: Packaging revenue, backlog, margins, and rerating moving together are aligned.
failure_criteria: Capacity expansion or customer capex delay that normalizes the bottleneck becomes 4B/4C.
normalization_point: Advanced packaging is a separate AI supply-chain bottleneck, not a generic semiconductor label.

success_criteria: Equipment backlog converting to revenue and OP leverage is aligned.
failure_criteria: Customer capex delay, export controls, or order pushout can break the thesis.
normalization_point: Semi equipment can be Green-possible, but remains customer-capex-cycle dependent.

success_criteria: Demand, utilization, FCF, and debt stability together can support Watch-to-Green.
failure_criteria: Capex and debt rising before demand and FCF makes this a 4C candidate.
normalization_point: SiC should not get Green from long-term narrative alone; Wolfspeed-style failure risk is central.

success_criteria: Order, lead-time, OP/EPS, and rerating evidence moving together is aligned.
failure_criteria: Capacity normalization, customer concentration, or valuation crowding can move it to 4B/4C.
normalization_point: Optical networking remains Green-possible when AI data-center order evidence is explicit.

success_criteria: The only success condition is verified trust restoration; otherwise Green remains blocked.
failure_criteria: Hard accounting trust events immediately block Stage 3-Green and trigger RedTeam review.
normalization_point: This overlay is a hard gate for all high-growth AI hardware and infrastructure cases.
